list.name: Changes
list.comment: major work getting extension functions correct for HugeInt. Also work on add/sub/32/64 without using mutate

task.summary: Default task
restructuring of roundAndFinalize() ... about to make the switch
a lot of work ... some payoff ... finalizing is still quite complex
introduce direct calls to finalizeExact
name change finalizeExact -> finalize. We now have finalize() and roundAndFinalize()
use extension functions to move MutDec finalization code to a DecFinalize
change U256 representation to LongArray
tests of ULongArray multiplication
tests of ULongArray multiplication
delete Int256 and friends ... no more need to provide 256 bit integers ... use HugeInt
S256 is dead
U256 upper layer => C256 for 256-bit coefficient
C256 splits out bitLen: Int, digitLen: Int
move c256Set999() back into C256
prune dead wood
rename tweaks
move calcBitLen999() global functions to U256Bits object
minor pruning
minor pruning
minor pruning
minor pruning
minor pruning
test case for exploration of recipMul
eliminate discardNaNPayload from MutDec.set(str) ... use the DecEnv
work on toEngineeringString() ... but for naught because I was working on the incorrect implementation
tweaks to printing
tweaks to printing
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
rework on printing integers and decimals
HugeInt kdoc
HugeInt kdoc
cleanup of HugeInt
cleanup of HugeInt
initial rework of HugeInt.fromTwosComplementBigEndianBytes
rework HugeInt from big/little-endian twos complement
more HugeInt kdoc and implementation tweaks
bitLength and Random support for HugeInt
added/test HugeInt().pow ... threw away gcd for performance reasons ... too much work ... left as an exercise for the reader.
newAdd now independent from mutateAdd.
major work getting extension functions correct for HugeInt. Also work on add/sub/32/64 without using mutate

MESSAGE.value: tests of ULongArray multiplication
delete Int256 and friends ... no more need to provide 256 bit integers ... use HugeInt
S256 is dead
U256 upper layer => C256 for 256-bit coefficient
C256 splits out bitLen: Int, digitLen: Int
move c256Set999() back into C256
prune dead wood
rename tweaks
move calcBitLen999() global functions to U256Bits object
minor pruning
test case for exploration of recipMul
eliminate discardNaNPayload from MutDec.set(str) ... use the DecEnv
work on toEngineeringString() ... but for naught because I was working on the incorrect implementation
tweaks to printing
rework on printing integers and decimals
HugeInt kdoc
cleanup of HugeInt
initial rework of HugeInt.fromTwosComplementBigEndianBytes
rework HugeInt from big/little-endian twos complement
more HugeInt kdoc and implementation tweaks
bitLength and Random support for HugeInt
added/test HugeInt().pow ... threw away gcd for performance reasons ... too much work ... left as an exercise for the reader.
newAdd now independent from mutateAdd.
major work getting extension functions correct for HugeInt. Also work on add/sub/32/64 without using mutate

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: major work getting extension functions correct for HugeInt. Also work on add/sub/32/64 without using mutate
